name: speckit-pro
description: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development workflows for Codex, including coaching, setup, custom-agent installation, autopilot execution, status dashboards, and PR review resolution.

interface.longDescription: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development for Codex. Each Codex skill ships its own `agents/openai.yaml` metadata sidecar, and SpecKit Pro also bundles Codex custom-agent TOML templates plus an install skill because Codex still registers custom agents from `.codex/agents/` or `~/.codex/agents/` rather than directly from the plugin bundle.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecKit Pro to install or refresh the bundled custom Codex agents.
Use SpecKit Pro to coach Spec-Driven Development and explain the next step for my current spec.
Use SpecKit Pro to set up a spec worktree and prepare the workflow for autopilot.
Use SpecKit Pro to run a populated workflow file with the installed SpecKit Codex agents.
